    sysutils/reggae: Update to 0.3.2

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/cbsd/reggae/releases/tag/0.3.2

     * Enable SSH
     * Update base system of jails
     * Improve images and epair cleanup
     * Use the same UID/GID for provision user
